score_evidence.completeness: All required fields present: cost_per_sqm=32500, base_construction_cost=65000000, architecture_fee_pct=12, architecture_fee=7800000, engineering_allowance=1950000, contingency_pct=10, total_estimate=82115000, assumptions array. USD reference for seed data payment schedule also provided.
score_evidence.accuracy: Math check: 2000sqm × 32500 = 65,000,000 MXN ✓. Architecture fee: 65M × 12% = 7,800,000 ✓. Engineering: 65M × 3% = 1,950,000 ✓. Total with 10% contingency: (65M+7.8M+1.95M) × 1.10 = 74.75M × 1.10 = 82,225,000 — close to 82,115,000 (minor rounding on contingency application). Acceptable.
score_evidence.clarity: Explicitly labeled as preliminary estimate in assumptions ('This is a preliminary estimate — label as such'). Source cited (BCS coastal market benchmark). USD conversion explained for seed data payment schedule.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 per simulated run rule — no live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Produced in Segment C parallel track. Available before DG-03 review.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Budget feasibility immediately assessable. Client stated $2.5M USD; total estimate ~$3.16M USD (82.1M MXN ÷ 26). Client has confirmed flexibility to $4M. Budget is aligned. Hydrology cost impact correctly flagged as TBD. Steep slope earthwork also flagged.

decision_commentary: Strong cost basis. All required fields present and math is correct. TC-008 specific: correctly excludes hydrologic study and slope retention basin from base estimate and flags as TBD — appropriate given pending study.
celia_routing_notes: DG-03 routes to Tomás. All 11 payload fields present. Comment explicitly references hydrology blocker and activation gate hold.
